description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foot even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a long way in creating footwear for those who demand comfort to the T. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet using your body heat, it's a hot favourite.The speciality of these shoes are that they need to Fit loosely around the feet,  and that neither the sides of the shoe nor the toe unit come in contact with the feet. Instead, there should be a quarter to half inch gap between the foot and the wall of the shoe, and you should be able to comfortably fit a finger between the heel and back strap.UpperEVA upper with leather over the mid-foot area that is textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durabilityEVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfortPerforations on the forefoot for ventilation, to drain away water and to add jibbitzAdjustable back strap with a velcro closure to support the ankle and hold the foot in placeUpper moulded to mid-sole for comfort and protection of feet from abrasionBroad EVA lining along the mid-sole for enhanced durabilityBrand button for styleEVA foot-bed with ergonomically designed lines for comfort and acupressureFungus, bacteria and odour resistant upper for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsHeel cup for added supportOut-soleSlip resistant out-sole with multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and back footShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
